metrics.name: academorix.season.created.total
metrics.description: source: admin_created / tenant_provisioning / legacy_backfill_command / clone_from_prior. business_type: label the caller's business_type at create time.

metrics.name: academorix.season.create.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end provisioning latency (validate + resolve defaults + write row + fire events).

metrics.name: academorix.season.current_changed.total
metrics.description: How often the current-season flag flips per tenant. Audit-critical; high rate is a red flag — year-over-year reports pivot on this.

metrics.name: academorix.season.status_transition.total
metrics.description: trigger: automated_phase_roll / manual_admin. Feeds a heatmap of when phase transitions happen.

metrics.name: academorix.season.dates_shifted.total
metrics.description: How often dates are shifted post-in_progress. status: in_progress / playoffs. Should stay low; frequent shifts feed the ops-quality dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.season.sport_key_changed.total
metrics.description: How often sport_key mutates. Should stay near 0 — every fire is a critical audit event.

metrics.name: academorix.season.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of Seasons per status per season_type. Populated hourly by a metrics-collector task.

metrics.name: academorix.season.per_tenant.count
metrics.description: Global histogram of seasons-per-tenant. Feeds the tier-adoption dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.season.current_invariant_drift.count
metrics.description: Number of (tenant, org, branch, sport_key) tuples with >1 is_current=true rows. Populated by ReconcileCurrentSeasonInvariantJob. Ideally always 0.

metrics.name: academorix.season.slot_exhaustion.total
metrics.description: How often season_slot entitlement quota refuses a Season create. Feeds the upsell funnel.

metrics.name: academorix.season.middleware_resolve.duration_ms
metrics.description: `season.resolve_active` middleware latency. source: header / current_cache / current_db. P99 target < 10ms.

metrics.name: academorix.season.middleware_reject.total
metrics.description: reason: cross_tenant / archived / no_active_season / registration_not_open / registration_closed / late_permission_missing. Cross-tenant rejects are security-relevant.

metrics.name: academorix.season.seed_default.duration_ms
metrics.description: SeedDefaultSeasonForTenantJob end-to-end latency. source: tenant_provisioning / legacy_backfill_command.

metrics.name: academorix.season.seed_skipped.total
metrics.description: reason: non_seasonal_business_type / feature_not_entitled / already_has_default. Explains why the tenant provisioning skipped the default-season seed.

metrics.name: academorix.season.phase_roll.transitions
metrics.description: How many transitions the automated job triggered in the run. Feeds capacity planning for the hourly job.

metrics.name: academorix.season.purge_pending.count
metrics.description: Archived Seasons past their retention window that haven't been hard-deleted yet. Feeds the `season-purge-queue-drained` health probe.
